content: Responsive layout retrofit pitfalls on fixed-width dashboards: (1) Fixed pixel widths on sidebar and cards cause horizontal overflow on mobile; switch to max-width + min-w-0 on flex children. (2) Tailwind mobile-first means unsuffixed classes apply at all sizes; adding sm: prefixes to existing desktop-targeted classes breaks desktop unexpectedly — audit all unsuffixed layout utilities before adding breakpoints. (3) Sticky/fixed sidebar becomes viewport-blocking overlay on mobile; must add z-index layering plus an overlay backdrop and a close gesture. (4) Tables and data grids inside cards overflow their container; need horizontal scroll wrapper or column hiding at sm breakpoint. (5) Transition from fixed sidebar to collapsed drawer introduces a state variable (isOpen) not present at desktop; if managed only in component local state, the sidebar position resets on navigation.
